goal: Compare batch normalization placement strategies in a 4-layer CNN for CIFAR-10: pre-activation BN (before ReLU) vs post-activation BN (after ReLU). Test with batch sizes 32 and 128 to see if placement interacts with batch size. 3 seeds (42, 123, 456), 5 epochs, 2000 training samples. Paired t-test and Cohen's d.
